collateral.directoryHint: Upload photos of all assets photographed at the client's farm/area as loan collateral, then link each photo to its asset from the Chattel Form.
collateral.uploadFailed: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
collateral.emptyHintReadOnly: No collateral photos were uploaded by the applicant.
collateral.emptyHintEditable: Click “ADD PHOTO” to upload photos of the client's assets.
collateral.noAssetLinked: No asset linked to this photo.
collateral.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this collateral photo? Assets linked to it will also be removed.

picker.title: SELECT ASSET
picker.subtitle: From the CHATTEL FORM — please list the assets you are pledging as collateral below
picker.emptyTitle: No assets listed in the Chattel Form yet.
picker.emptyHint: Please fill in the CHATTEL FORM first before selecting here.

delegation.formTitle: FORM FOR DELEGATING OFFICE AND AUTHORITY TEMPORARILY

intro.suffix: as I will be out of the office, I hereby delegate my office and authority to the staff member selected below for the specified period.

fields.limitationsPlaceholder: e.g. Approvals up to TZS 5,000,000; no new hires...
fields.handoverNotesPlaceholder: Pending matters, key contacts, ongoing items...

validation.requiredFields: Please select the staff, period and responsibilities being delegated.
validation.requirePin: Enter your password/PIN to sign and authorize the delegation.

delegation.submitSuccess: Your office delegation has been sent to the selected staff. They will be notified to acknowledge it.

signatureReuse.noSignatureYet: No saved signature yet — it won't appear on the signed document.
signatureReuse.reuseHint: Your saved signature is reused — enter your password to sign.
